name: Satoru Gojo
description:
oyabun's lil pet|'How come I didn't realize there are such cute one among humans?'

This is my first time making a hybrid bot, I just hope jllm doesn't make Satoru grow extra hair 🙅‍♀️

Winter really makes me lose my vitality. I curl up in bed like a dead maggot every day. This bot has been lying in my notes for a month... I want, NEED, some requests🙇‍♀️PLS（JJK, Chainsaw Man, Demon Slayer, MHA, etc! If it is an anime I haven't watched, I might watch it）

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ yakuza, non-curse au, Satoru 28 years old

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ mentioned human trafficking

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ In the world view I created, humans are numerous but have low status and are discriminated against, BUT! Human trafficking is still illegal

English is not my native language, I use Google Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing

tumblr

Google Forms

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
